data.content:
The problem is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file but **never adds it to the `Compile` item group**. MSBuild's implicit glob expands at evaluation time (before targets run), so it won't pick up files created during the build.

The fix is to explicitly add the generated file to `Compile` and `FileWrites` within the target:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a source file during the build, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild evaluates globs at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the generated file isn't picked up by the implicit `Compile` glob.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it with `FileWrites` for proper clean behavior.

This is the classic "including generated files" problem. The target needs to include:
```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```

I'm confident this is the right approach, so I'll go ahead and apply it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never tells the compiler about it. MSBuild's implicit `Compile` glob expands at **evaluation time** (before any targets execute), so files created during the build are invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added the generated file to the `Compile` item group inside the target (at execution time), plus `FileWrites` so `dotnet clean` removes it:

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
